## [00:00 - 00:31]

In this lesson, you're going to learn my secret marketing wagon wheel. Yes, silly name, but wait till you see. It's something I've been using for probably 10 years to outdo the competitors. Plus you're going to learn from my team, the social media, YouTube, Facebook, Instagram, affiliate strategies to fill your mastermind group or workshop. Yeah.
